title: CommerceSettings - Metadata API
description: Represents settings for various Commerce features.

buyerGroupExtensibility.description: Indicates whether Buyer Group Extensibility is enabled (true) or not (false). Available in API version 64.0 and later.

commerceAnalyticsEnabled.description: Indicates whether Commerce Analytics is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceAppEnabled.description: Indicates whether Commerce App is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceConciergeEnabled.description: Indicates whether Commerce Concierge bots are enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceCopilotEcomEnabled.description: Indicates whether Commerce Copilot is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceDCSegmentEnabled.description: Indicates whether the Data 360 segment integration is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceDiscoveryExpansion.description: Indicates whether the Commerce Discovery Expansion service is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceEnabled.description: Indicates whether Commerce is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceNGPEnabled.description: Indicates whether NGP (“Salesforce”) Pricing is enabled (true) or not (false).

commerceRLMSubs.description: Indicates whether Commerce Revenue Lifecycle Management Subscriptions is enabled (true) or not (false).

generateInvPerSubscription.description: Indicates whether a separate invoice is generated per subscription (true) or not (false). Available in API version 64.0 and later.

lowestUnitPriceTracking.description: Indicates whether lowest unit price tracking (for EU customers) is enabled (true) or not (false).

messagingEngagementDataKit.description: Indicates whether Message Engagement data kit is enabled (true) or not (false). Message Engagement data kit is a Data 360 data model object (DMO) for a user’s engagement with a marketing message.

wsdl_segment:
```xml
<xsd:complexType name="CommerceSettings">
  <xsd:complexContent>
    <xsd:extension base="tns:Metadata">
      <xsd:sequence>
        <xsd:element name="b2CMerchantAgentEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="buyerGroupExtensibility" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceAnalyticsEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceAppEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceConciergeEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceContractPricing" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceCopilotEcomEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceDCSegmentEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceDiscoveryExpansion" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceHighPrecisionQtyNGP" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceNGPEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceProcedurePlan" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="commerceRLMSubs" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="convCommShopCopilotEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="enableCheckoutHSOIPref" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="extendCommerceContext" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="generateInvPerSubscription" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="lowestUnitPriceTracking" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="merchAgentTemplateEnabled" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
        <xsd:element name="messagingEngagementDataKit" minOccurs="0" type="xsd:boolean"/>
      </xsd:sequence>
    </xsd:extension>
  </xsd:complexContent>
</xsd:complexType>
```
